steps.t: Jarl Gurthilm can be found in after-battle Osgiliath. You should find the Variag Jarl and learn what he wants.
You should talk to Mablung, who can be found at the Ranger encampment in after-battle Osgiliath.
Collect supplies and payment scattered around the encampment in after-battle Osgiliath.
Jarl Gurthilm can be found in after-battle Osgiliath. You should bring the payment to Variag Jarl and make sure he keeps to his promise.
You should talk to Mablung, who can can be found at the Ranger encampment in after-battle Osgiliath.
